data.name: ErrorLoadingData
data.value: An error occurred while loading administration data.

data.name: MemberManagementPlaceholder
data.value: Member management features will be available in a future update. You will be able to view members, remove members, and manage their roles.

data.name: JoinRequestsDescription
data.value: Review and approve pending join requests.

data.name: JoinRequestsPlaceholder
data.value: Join request management features will be available in a future update. You will be able to approve or deny pending membership requests.

data.name: RoleManagementDescription
data.value: Assign administrator and moderator roles to members.

data.name: RoleManagementPlaceholder
data.value: Role management features will be available in a future update. You will be able to promote members to administrators or moderators.

data.name: BannedMembersPlaceholder
data.value: Banned member management features will be available in a future update. You will be able to view banned members and unban them if needed.

data.name: GroupSettingsPlaceholder
data.value: Advanced settings features will be available in a future update. You will be able to configure group rules, visibility options, and more.

data.name: GroupRulesDescription
data.value: Define the rules that members must follow in this group.

data.name: RuleTitlePlaceholder
data.value: Enter a brief, clear title for this rule

data.name: RuleDescriptionPlaceholder
data.value: Explain the rule's purpose and what behavior is expected or prohibited

data.name: NoRulesYet
data.value: No rules have been defined for this group yet.

data.name: NoRulesYetHint
data.value: Click "Add Default Rules" to start with common rules, or "Add Rule" to create your own.

data.name: ConfirmDeleteRuleMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this rule? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: DefaultRulesAdded
data.value: Default rules have been added. You can now edit them to fit your group's needs.

data.name: CannotAddDefaultRulesExist
data.value: Cannot add default rules when rules already exist. Delete existing rules first.

data.name: ErrorLoadingRules
data.value: An error occurred while loading rules.

data.name: ErrorCreatingRule
data.value: An error occurred while creating the rule.

data.name: ErrorUpdatingRule
data.value: An error occurred while updating the rule.

data.name: ErrorDeletingRule
data.value: An error occurred while deleting the rule.

data.name: ErrorSavingRule
data.value: An error occurred while saving the rule.

data.name: ErrorReorderingRules
data.value: An error occurred while reordering rules.

data.name: ErrorAddingDefaultRules
data.value: An error occurred while adding default rules.

data.name: NoJoinRequests
data.value: No pending join requests at this time.

data.name: ConfirmDenyRequestMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to deny this join request? The user will not be notified but can submit another request later.

data.name: RequestApproved
data.value: {0} has been approved and added to the group.

data.name: RequestDenied
data.value: Join request from {0} has been denied.

data.name: ErrorLoadingRequests
data.value: An error occurred while loading join requests.

data.name: ErrorApprovingRequest
data.value: An error occurred while approving the request.

data.name: ErrorDenyingRequest
data.value: An error occurred while denying the request.
